full_text:
Bai Shou 白壽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bai Shou (白壽). Died in the year after Zhuge Liang occupied Hanzhong. Bai Shou was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Bai Shou lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

Short Biography
Died in the year after Zhuge Liang occupied Hanzhong.

Zizhi tongjian: 71
BiographySanguo Yanyi
In Zhuge Liang’s memorial, he listed the officers who had died in the year since they had taken Hanzhong, naming Bo Shou as one of the “leaders of rank and generals of stations, to the number of near eighty, all people unsurpassed in dash and valor.”
